column1: # Phase 6 OTA partition table — dual-app for esp_https_ota.
# Slice F4 swapped this from the original single-app + 11 MB SPIFFS
# layout to dual-app (ota_0 / ota_1) so the bootloader can flip
# between slots after a successful OTA flash. SPIFFS shrinks from
# 11 MB to ~7.94 MB; the icon cache + LittleFS state easily fits.
# Note: changing the partition table is a clean-flash event for
# already-deployed devices. Howler hasn't shipped to production

column2: so the first OTA-capable build will be flashed via USB; from
